\tzpentry{ID3393}{Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3393 introduces Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \ddot q_{\ell m n} + 2\gamma_{\ell n}\dot q_{\ell m n} + \omega_{\ell n}^2 q_{\ell m n} = F_{\ell m n}(t). \end{equation}
